---
applyTo: "**/*.vue,composables/**/*.js,composables/**/*.ts"
description: "Apply the repository's Vue component guidance."
---

Canonical component guidance lives in `.ai/skills/vue/SKILL.md` and `.ai/rules/project-architecture.md`.

Use focused single-file components, keep props and emits explicit, prefer simple Composition API patterns, and keep templates semantic and accessible across the homepage, embeds, and legal routes.
